notes: Comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.6.
Buttons manager remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.16.
Gifts now use the same manager algorithm as buttons: after post selection the bot detects existing gifts and offers add/edit/delete.
Gift management screens show actual gift content summary: URL, text, or MAX attachment marker.
Multiple gifts are supported through gifts_json; legacy gift_title/gift_link stays compatible as gift 1.
Gift claim payload now includes giftIndex so each gift button can deliver its own gift.
Post patcher updated to DB-V3-POST-PATCHER-1.3-MULTI-GIFTS-PRESERVE and rebuilds comments + buttons + all gift rows together.
No overlay, no floating hints, no public/app.js override, no external code.run /app comments button.
Audit: still layered through 7510-7517 wrappers. After acceptance, merge admin flows into one clean core module.
